overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cloak walking through a grassy field toward a massive glowing red Erdtree under a twilight sky. The character passes grazing sheep and continues through the open landscape with scattered rocks and trees, eventually turning uphill past a wooden fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered boulders and autumn trees

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through tall grass toward the glowing red Erdtree in the distance

entered.detail: massive luminous tree with crimson branches dominating the sky
cluster of large grey boulders and rocky terrain
trees with orange and yellow foliage dotting the landscape
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland under a twilight sky illuminated by a massive glowing red tree in the distance. Large rock formations line the right side while scattered autumn trees appear on the left, with a narrow dirt path leading forward.

events.description: flock of sheep appears grazing in the field ahead

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the field passing through a group of grazing sheep

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing on grass and slowly moving across the path

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a group of sheep appears grazing in the field. The character walks through the sparse herd while the large rock formation recedes behind, and the glowing red tree grows larger in the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field approaching the massive tree

agents.ego_description: character walking directly toward the towering red tree which now fills the upper portion of the sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open field with the massive glowing Erdtree now dominating the sky directly ahead. The sheep have been left behind, and the autumn trees now appear on the right side as the character approaches the tree.

events.description: character turns right and begins ascending a grassy hill

agents.ego_description: character turns right and walks uphill along a winding path, moving away from direct approach to the tree

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence lining the uphill path
distant crumbling stone structures on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and ascends a grassy hillside, with a wooden fence appearing on the right side of the path. The glowing red tree shifts to the left side of the frame as the sky opens up to reveal more clouds and distant stone ruins on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open grassland that gradually draws closer to a massive, glowing red tree under a twilight sky. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path, flanked by large rock formations on the right and scattered autumn trees on the left. As the character progresses, the scene opens up to reveal a group of sheep grazing in the field. The camera then moves through the sparse herd while the rock formations recede into the distance, allowing the luminous red tree to grow larger and more dominant in the center of the view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open field that gradually shifts into an uphill ascent toward a distant horizon. It begins with the character moving forward as the massive glowing Erdtree dominates the sky directly ahead, passing autumn trees that appear on the right. As the character turns right to climb a grassy hillside, a wooden fence emerges along the path, causing the glowing red tree to shift toward the left side of the frame. The scene then expands as the sky opens up to reveal drifting clouds and the silhouettes of distant stone ruins on the horizon.
